headline: Q1 Earnings Review: Medical Devices & Supplies - Diversified Stocks Led by Baxter (NYSE:BAX)
summary: As the Q1 earnings season wraps, let’s dig into this quarter’s best and worst performers in the medical devices & supplies - diversified industry, including Baxter (NYSE:BAX) and its peers.
